name: Target Group Inc.
business: Target Group Inc. is engaged in the cultivation, processing, and distribution of curated cannabis products for the medical and adult-use recreational cannabis market in Canada, with international sales to Israel, Germany, Australia, the United Kingdom, and Poland. The company operates through its wholly-owned subsidiary Canary Rx Inc., a Canadian licensed producer, and generates revenue primarily from wholesale cannabis sales.
sellsTo: International distributors (Israel, Germany, Australia, UK, Poland)

exposures.sentence: The Company is engaged in the cultivation, processing and distribution of curated cannabis products for the medical and adult-use recreational cannabis market in Canada and continues to evaluate opportunities, where legalized by state legislation or related to rescheduling, in the United States.

Target Group s product manufacturing includes, will include, but will not be limited to the following: Cannabis flower pods for vaporizer use Cannabis extract pods for vaporizer use Cannabis pre-rolls K-Cup infused coffee and tea pods Infused cannabis beverages Infused cannabis edibles Infused topical products and CBD wellness products.

tamClaims.claim: The Canadian legal cannabis industry generated CDN$28.7 billion in cumulative nationwide sales from October 2018 through 2024.
tamClaims.sentence: According to a 2025 report published by the Ontario Cannabis Store (OCS) in collaboration with Deloitte Canada, the Canadian legal cannabis industry generated CDN$28.7 billion in cumulative nationwide sales from October 2018 through 2024, primarily driven by recreational products.
